matcher_value: Get-CimInstance Win32_Volume | Where-Object { $_.DriveType -eq 3 -and $_.Capacity } | Select-Object @{N='Filesystem';E={if($_.DriveLetter){$_.DriveLetter}else{$_.Name.TrimEnd('\')}}},@{N='Size(GB)';E={[math]::Round($_.Capacity/1GB,2)}},@{N='Used(GB)';E={[math]::Round(($_.Capacity-$_.FreeSpace)/1GB,2)}},@{N='Avail(GB)';E={[math]::Round($_.FreeSpace/1GB,2)}},@{N='Use%';E={[math]::Round((($_.Capacity-$_.FreeSpace)/$_.Capacity)*100,2)}},@{N='Mounted on';E={$_.Name.TrimEnd('\')}} | Format-Table -Auto
